'''kozhazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wolfly|wolfly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wolfly|wolfly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kozhazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozhazithi|kozhazithi]] || [[word:kozhaziji|kozhaziji]] || [[word:kozhazishi|kozhazishi]] || [[word:kozhaziki|kozhaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozhazuthuthu|kozhazuthuthu]] || [[word:kozhazujuju|kozhazujuju]] || [[word:kozhazushushu|kozhazushushu]] || [[word:kozhazukuku|kozhazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozhazuthu|kozhazuthu]] || [[word:kozhazuju|kozhazuju]] || [[word:kozhazushu|kozhazushu]] || [[word:kozhazuku|kozhazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozhazufthuf|kozhazufthuf]] || [[word:kozhazufjuf|kozhazufjuf]] || [[word:kozhazufshuf|kozhazufshuf]] || [[word:kozhazufkuf|kozhazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozhazethe|kozhazethe]] || [[word:kozhazeje|kozhazeje]] || [[word:kozhazeshe|kozhazeshe]] || [[word:kozhazeke|kozhazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozhazothotho|kozhazothotho]] || [[word:kozhazojojo|kozhazojojo]] || [[word:kozhazoshosho|kozhazoshosho]] || [[word:kozhazokoko|kozhazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozhazotho|kozhazotho]] || [[word:kozhazojo|kozhazojo]] || [[word:kozhazosho|kozhazosho]] || [[word:kozhazoko|kozhazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozhazofthof|kozhazofthof]] || [[word:kozhazofjof|kozhazofjof]] || [[word:kozhazofshof|kozhazofshof]] || [[word:kozhazofkof|kozhazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozhazïfthïf|kozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfjïf|kozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfshïf|kozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfkïf|kozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozhazïfthïfthïf|kozhazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfjïfjïf|kozhazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfshïfshïf|kozhazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfkïfkïf|kozhazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozhazïfthïf|kozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfjïf|kozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfshïf|kozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfkïf|kozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozhazïfthïf|kozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfjïf|kozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfshïf|kozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:kozhazïfkïf|kozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kozhazæthæ|kozhazæthæ]] || [[word:kozhazæjæ|kozhazæjæ]] || [[word:kozhazæshæ|kozhazæshæ]] || [[word:kozhazækæ|kozhazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kozhazathatha|kozhazathatha]] || [[word:kozhazajaja|kozhazajaja]] || [[word:kozhazashasha|kozhazashasha]] || [[word:kozhazakaka|kozhazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kozhazatha|kozhazatha]] || [[word:kozhazaja|kozhazaja]] || [[word:kozhazasha|kozhazasha]] || [[word:kozhazaka|kozhazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kozhazafthaf|kozhazafthaf]] || [[word:kozhazafjaf|kozhazafjaf]] || [[word:kozhazafshaf|kozhazafshaf]] || [[word:kozhazafkaf|kozhazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kozhazasha|kozhazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kozhazshësha|kozhazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kozhazrosha|kozhazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kozhazmusha|kozhazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kozhazyasha|kozhazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokozhaznkshësha|gokozhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokozhaznkrosha|gokozhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokozhaznkmusha|gokozhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokozhaznkyasha|gokozhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kozhazhazasha|kozhazhazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kozhazhazshësha|kozhazhazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kozhazhazrosha|kozhazhazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kozhazhazmusha|kozhazhazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kozhazhazyasha|kozhazhazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokozhazhaznkshësha|gokozhazhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokozhazhaznkrosha|gokozhazhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokozhazhaznkmusha|gokozhazhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokozhazhaznkyasha|gokozhazhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kezhæzasha|kezhæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kezhæzshësha|kezhæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kezhæzrosha|kezhæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kezhæzmusha|kezhæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kezhæzyasha|kezhæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokezhæznkshësha|gokezhæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokezhæznkrosha|gokezhæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokezhæznkmusha|gokezhæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokezhæznkyasha|gokezhæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kozhfazasha|kozhfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kozhfazshësha|kozhfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kozhfazrosha|kozhfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kozhfazmusha|kozhfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kozhfazyasha|kozhfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokozhfaznkshësha|gokozhfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokozhfaznkrosha|gokozhfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokozhfaznkmusha|gokozhfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokozhfaznkyasha|gokozhfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
